allow: PowerShell($log = "$env:TEMP\\godot_check.log"; Write-Output "=== line count ==="; \(Get-Content $log | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; Write-Output "=== full content ==="; Get-Content $log)
Bash(rm -rf scripts/units scripts/effects scripts/ui scenes/units scenes/effects)
Bash(rm -f node_2d.tscn player.tscn scenes/main_menu.tscn scenes/commander.tscn scenes/objective.tscn)

Bash(rm -f scripts/game_manager.gd scripts/command_controller.gd scripts/commander.gd scripts/enemy_commander.gd scripts/terrain.gd scripts/objective.gd scripts/cinematic.gd scripts/sound_manager.gd scripts/main_menu.gd scripts/fog_overlay.gd)

Bash(rm -f scripts/game_manager.gd.uid scripts/command_controller.gd.uid scripts/commander.gd.uid scripts/enemy_commander.gd.uid scripts/terrain.gd.uid scripts/objective.gd.uid scripts/cinematic.gd.uid scripts/sound_manager.gd.uid scripts/main_menu.gd.uid scripts/fog_overlay.gd.uid)

Bash(rm -f /tmp/ghtest.gd; "C:/Users/Felix/Downloads/Godot_v4.6.3-stable_win64.exe/Godot_v4.6.3-stable_win64_console.exe" --headless res://game.tscn --quit-after 200 2>&1 | grep -iE "error|invalid|parse|SCRIPT" | grep -viE "resources still in use" | head; echo "=== ok ===")
Bash(sed -i 's/const BARRACKS_GRAIN := 240.0/const BARRACKS_GRAIN := 3.0/; s/const BARRACKS_IRON := 150.0/const BARRACKS_IRON := 2.0/' scripts/game.gd)
Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\t_set_objective\\\(\\\)\\s+# your personal charge for the day\)/\\t_save_game\(\)\\n\\t_apply_save\(_load_save_file\(\)\)\\n$1/' scripts/game.gd)
Bash(perl -i -pe 's/^\(\\t{3}\)\(pts\\.append\\\(mp\\\)\)$/$1_play_shot_line\(mp\)       # each musket in the volley reports too \(budgeted\)\\n$1$2/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\tif fresh > 0 and _contact_cd <= 0\\.0:\)/\\tif true:\\n\\t\\tvar _spc := 0\\n\\t\\tvar _enc := 0\\n\\t\\tfor _bb in battalions:\\n\\t\\t\\tif _bb.team != pteam and not _bb.figs.is_empty\(\):\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t_enc += 1\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tif _bb._spotted: _spc += 1\\n\\t\\tif int\(_t\) % 5 == 0: print\("[FOG] spotted %d of %d enemy battalions" % [_spc, _enc]\)\\n$1/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\tif fresh > 0 and _contact_cd <= 0\\.0:\)/\\tif int\(_t\) % 6 == 0:\\n\\t\\tvar _md := 1e9\\n\\t\\tfor _bb in battalions:\\n\\t\\t\\tif _bb.team != pteam and not _bb.figs.is_empty\(\):\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tfor _ee in eyes:\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t_md = minf\(_md, sqrt\(_bb.pos.distance_squared_to\(_ee[0] as Vector3\)\)\)\\n\\t\\tprint\("[FOG] eyes=%d nearest enemy=%.0fm \(cav sight=%.0f\)" % [eyes.size\(\), _md, SIGHT_CAV]\)\\n$1/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\t\\t\\t"scouting":\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t# ride out to the scout point\)/\\t\\t\\t\\tif int\(_t\) % 4 == 0: print\("[SCOUT] a regiment is scouting at t=%d" % int\(_t\)\)\\n$1/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\tif not _got_state:\\n\\t\\t_got_state = true\\n\\t\\tprint\\\("\\[NET\\] client received first state \\\(AOI; OOB %d\\\)" % battalions\\.size\\\(\\\)\\\)\)/$1\\n\\tif player != null:\\n\\t\\tvar _fr := 0\\n\\t\\tvar _en := 0\\n\\t\\tfor _e in data:\\n\\t\\t\\tvar _bb = battalions[int\(_e[0]\)] if int\(_e[0]\) >= 0 and int\(_e[0]\) < battalions.size\(\) else null\\n\\t\\t\\tif _bb != null:\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tif _bb.team == player.team: _fr += 1\\n\\t\\t\\t\\telse: _en += 1\\n\\t\\tif int\(_t\) % 5 == 0: print\("[FOG4] my team=%d  received this batch: %d friendly, %d enemy" % [player.team, _fr, _en]\)/' scripts/game.gd)
Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\tif "--server" in args or "--dedicated" in args:\)/\\tif "--hist-waterloo" in args:\\n\\t\\t_launch_historical\("waterloo"\)\\n\\t\\treturn\\n$1/' scripts/menu.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\tif "--server" in args or "--dedicated" in args:\)/\\tif "--hist-waterloo" in args:\\n\\t\\tget_tree\(\).create_timer\(0.5\).timeout.connect\(func\(\): _launch_historical\("waterloo"\)\)\\n\\t\\treturn\\n$1/' scripts/menu.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\t_set_objective\\\(\\\)\\s+# your personal charge for the day\)/\\tif GameConfig.historical != "": print\("[HIST] %s: spawned %d battalions" % [GameConfig.historical, battalions.size\(\)]\)\\n$1/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\t_set_objective\\\(\\\)\\s+# your personal charge for the day\)/\\tif GameConfig.historical != "": print\("[HIST] %d batts, %d brigades, %d divisions, %d cav, %d guns" % [battalions.size\(\), brigades.size\(\), divisions.size\(\), cavalry.size\(\), guns.size\(\)]\)\\n$1/' scripts/game.gd)
Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(func _waterloo_begin\\\(\\\) -> void:\\n\\t_wat_t0 = _t\\n\\t_wat_phase = -1\)/$1\\n\\tprint\("[WAT] begin, brigades=", brigades.size\(\)\)/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\tif "--server" in args or "--dedicated" in args:\)/\\tif "--hist-fr" in args:\\n\\t\\tget_tree\(\).create_timer\(0.5\).timeout.connect\(func\(\):\\n\\t\\t\\t_choose_command\("waterloo"\)\\n\\t\\t\\tfor i in range\(_hist_setup.units.size\(\)\):\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tif String\(_hist_setup.units[i].name\) == "1er Grenadiers I":\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t_pick_unit\(i\); break\)\\n\\t\\treturn\\n$1/' scripts/menu.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\t_set_objective\\\(\\\)\\s+# your personal charge for the day\)/\\tif GameConfig.historical != "" and player != null: print\("[PICK] player team=", player.team, " pos=", player.pos\)\\n$1/' scripts/game.gd)
Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\tvar fr := \\\(player != null and player\\.team == 0\\\)\)/$1\\n\\tprint\("[POV] phase=", name, " french=", fr\)/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\t\\t\\t\\tcoat_col = _coats_for\\\(u\\.team\\\)\\[clampi\\\(int\\\(u\\.coat_idx\\\), 0, 2\\\)\\]\)/$1\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tprint\("[HERO] team=", u.team, " coat=", coat_col\)/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(cd ~/Documents/GitHub/Commander && "/c/Users/Felix/Downloads/Godot_v4.6.3-stable_win64.exe/Godot_v4.6.3-stable_win64_console.exe" --headless --editor --quit 2>&1 | grep -iE "error|parse error|SCRIPT ERROR" | grep -vi "resources still in use" | head; echo "PARSE_DONE" *)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\\t\\t\\telif atwill or commanded:\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tfire = true\\n/\\t\\t\\telif atwill:\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tfire = true\\n\\t\\t\\telif commanded:\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tvar vt := float\(f.get\("volley_t", 0.0\)\) - delta   # his place in the ragged ripple\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tf["volley_t"] = vt\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tfire = vt <= 0.0\\n/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\\t\\telif atwill or commanded:\\n\\t\\t\\tfire = true\\n/\\t\\telif atwill:\\n\\t\\t\\tfire = true\\n\\t\\telif commanded:\\n\\t\\t\\tvar vt := float\(f.get\("volley_t", 0.0\)\) - delta   # his place in the ragged ripple\\n\\t\\t\\tf["volley_t"] = vt\\n\\t\\t\\tfire = vt <= 0.0\\n/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(func _update_brigades\\\(delta: float\\\) -> void:\)/$1\\n\\tif _wmap and _battle_begun:\\n\\t\\t_dbg_adv += delta\\n\\t\\tif _dbg_adv > 3.0:\\n\\t\\t\\t_dbg_adv = 0.0\\n\\t\\t\\tvar z0 := 0.0; var n0 := 0; var z1 := 0.0; var n1 := 0\\n\\t\\t\\tfor _bb in battalions:\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tif _bb.spent: continue\\n\\t\\t\\t\\tif _bb.team == 0: z0 += _bb.pos.z; n0 += 1\\n\\t\\t\\t\\telse: z1 += _bb.pos.z; n1 += 1\\n\\t\\t\\tprint\("[ADV] t=%d  french_z=%.0f  allied_z=%.0f" % [int\(_t\), z0\\/maxi\(1,n0\), z1\\/maxi\(1,n1\)]\)/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\\t\\t\\t\\ts2 = 0\\.25                       # a steady line: only if nothing better offers/\\t\\t\\t\\ts2 = 1.25                       # a steady LINE is charge-worthy — ride in to break it or force square/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\\t\\t\\ts2 = 0\\.25                       # a steady line: only if nothing better offers/\\t\\t\\ts2 = 1.25                       # a steady LINE is charge-worthy — ride in to break it or force square/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's{\\t\\t_commander_task\\\(delta\\\)           # the General sends you on tasks / summons you to the push}{\\t\\t# _commander_task\(delta\)         # the Generals' brigade orders to the player — removed for 'now} scripts/game.gd *)
Bash(perl -0pi -e 's{_commander_task\\\(delta\\\)           # the General sends}{# _commander_task\(delta\)  [removed for now] the General sends}' scripts/game.gd)
Bash(awk '/^func _order\\\(/{f=1} f{print NR": "$0} /^func /{if\(f && NR>L+1\){exit}} {if\($0 ~ /^func _order\\\(/\) L=NR}' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\n\\t_assign_army_roles\\\(\\\)\\n\)/$1\\tfor _a in armies:\\n\\t\\tprint\("[WAT-DOC] team=%d nation=%s attack=%s aggr=%.2f role=%s" % [_a.team,_a.nation,_a.doctrine.get\("attack","?"\),_a.aggression,_a.role]\)\\n/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\tarmy.threat_t = _t\\n\)/$1\\tif int\(_t\) % 8 == 0:\\n\\t\\tprint\("[WAT-ANT] team=%d t=%.0f tx=%.0f mass=%.2f" % [army.team,_t,army.threat_x,army.threat_mass]\)\\n/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\n\\t_assign_army_roles\\\(\\\)\\n\)/$1\\tfor _a in armies:\\n\\t\\tprint\("[WAT-DOC] team=%d nation=%s attack=%s grandbat=%.1f aggr=%.2f role=%s" % [_a.team,_a.nation,_a.doctrine.get\("attack","?"\),_a.doctrine.get\("grand_bat",0.0\),_a.aggression,_a.role]\)\\n/' scripts/game.gd)
Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\t\\tif not b.skirmish and b.formation != want:\\n\)/\\t\\tif not b.skirmish and b.formation != want and b.team == 0:\\n\\t\\t\\t_dbg_fswitch += 1\\n$1/' scripts/game.gd)
Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(func _ai_move_to\\\(b: Batt, tgt: Vector3, face: float, delta: float, deploy_line: bool\\\) -> void:\\n\)/var _dbg_fswitch := 0\\nvar _dbg_ft := 0.0\\n$1/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(\\t_brigade_set_anchor\\\(br, delta\\\)        # ease the line toward its objective each frame\\n\)/$1\\tif br.team == 0 and br.idx == 0 and int\(_t\) % 5 == 0 and _t - _dbg_ft > 4.5:\\n\\t\\t_dbg_ft = _t\\n\\t\\tprint\("[STROBE] t=%.0f team0_form_switches_5s_window=%d" % [_t, _dbg_fswitch]\); _dbg_fswitch = 0\\n/' scripts/game.gd)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\(func _update_brigades\\\(delta: float\\\) -> void:\\n\)/$1\\tif int\(_t\) % 6 == 0 and _t - _dbg_sqt > 5.5:\\n\\t\\t_dbg_sqt = _t\\n\\t\\tvar _sq := 0; var _ln := 0; var _col := 0; var _mv := 0\\n\\t\\tfor _b in battalions:\\n\\t\\t\\tif _b.team != 0 or _b.spent: continue\\n\\t\\t\\tif _b.formation == "square": _sq += 1\\n\\t\\t\\telif _b.formation == "line": _ln += 1\\n\\t\\t\\telse: _col += 1\\n\\t\\tprint\("[FORM] t=%.0f square=%d line=%d column\\/march=%d" % [_t, _sq, _ln, _col]\)\\n/' scripts/game.gd)
